{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Lowgold course
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Lowgold course]] is shrouded in an orange cloud to obscure obstacles.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
